title: Add local create/promote/localize
description: Add tsk create --local, and tsk promote/localize to move issues between project and project-local.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting work: implement tsk create --local and promote/localize routing, ensure specs/steps cover behavior, update Python/Rust parity, run behave + cucumber + spec parity.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Verified local issue routing behaviors already implemented: create --local, promote/localize, gitignore handling. Tests: cd python && coverage run --source=taskulus -m behave; coverage report -m (100%); cd rust && cargo test --test cucumber; python tools/check_spec_parity.py.
